title: VaultResultMediationE6
description: Capability-track constant-shape output for MEDIATION purpose (E6 coarse variant). Max entropy: 6 bits.

stance_a.description: Stance classification for party A (4 values = 2.00 bits)

stance_b.description: Stance classification for party B (4 values = 2.00 bits)

situation.description: Situational assessment of mediation state (4 values = 2.00 bits)

x-vcav-prompt-instruction: Based on this mediation conversation, classify each party's stance and the overall situation.
x-vcav-prompt-output-format:
Respond with valid JSON using ONLY these values:
- stance_a: "CONSTRUCTIVE" | "REQUESTING" | "DEFENDING" | "PASSIVE"
- stance_b: "CONSTRUCTIVE" | "REQUESTING" | "DEFENDING" | "PASSIVE"
- situation: "PROGRESS_INTERPERSONAL" | "PROGRESS_STRUCTURAL" | "STUCK" | "ESCALATE"
$comment: Total entropy: 6.00 bits (4 x 4 x 4 = 64 outputs). E6 is the coarsest mediation schema variant.
